name: agent-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        addyosmani /

      agent-skills  

    
      Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
summary: 该项目为AI编程助手提供生产级工程技能，值得关注因其能提升AI代理的编码质量和效率。

name: msitarzewski
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        msitarzewski /

      agency-agents  

    
      A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
summary: 该项目提供一套完整的AI代理工具集，涵盖从前端开发到社区管理的多种专业角色，每个代理都有独特个性和成熟交付流程，值得关注因其能一站式满足多样化AI协作需求。

name: sia
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        hexo-ai /

      sia  

    
      SIA is a Self Improving AI framework to autonomously improve the performance of any AI system (Model / Agent) on a benchmark task.
summary: SIA是一个自我改进的AI框架，旨在自主提升任何AI系统（模型/代理）在基准任务上的性能，值得关注因为它能自动化优化AI表现。

name: SkillSpector
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        NVIDIA /

      SkillSpector  

    
      Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.
summary: SkillSpector是NVIDIA开发的AI技能安全扫描工具，用于检测AI代理技能中的漏洞、恶意模式和安全风险，值得关注因为它能提升AI应用的安全性。

name: container
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        apple /

      container  

    
      A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
summary: 苹果开发的`container`是一个用于在Mac上通过轻量级虚拟机创建和运行Linux容器的工具，采用Swift编写并针对Apple芯片优化，值得关注因其结合了虚拟机和容器技术的高效性。

name: agentsview
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        kenn-io /

      agentsview  

    
      Local-first session intelligence and analytics for coding agents, supporting Claude Code, Codex, and more than 20 other agents. Also: 100x faster replacement for ccusage!
summary: 该项目是一个本地优先的编码智能体会话分析与统计工具，支持Claude Code、Codex等20多种智能体，并提供比ccusage快100倍的性能替代方案。

name: mattermost
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        mattermost /

      mattermost  

    
      Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..
summary: Mattermost 是一个开源的跨软件开发生命周期的安全协作平台，值得关注因为它提供了高度可定制且注重隐私的团队沟通解决方案。

name: openmed
description:
Star

      open-source healthcare ai
summary: "OpenMed 是一个开源的医疗健康 AI 项目，专注于提供先进的医疗人工智能解决方案，值得关注因其致力于推动医疗技术的开放共享与创新。"
